title: AIIMS Raebareli Notification 2026 - Walk-in-Interview for Project Research Scientist I Posts
description: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Raebareli (AIIMS Raebareli) has officially released the vacancies for Project Research Scientist I Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the Post Graduation M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Raebareli Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit and the selection process. Salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for these posts. Interested and eligible candidates can attend the walk-in at th...
